item.title: Plymouth Fury with a 45 RPM Player
item.description: A Plymouth Fury is featured with a built-in 45 RPM player, highlighting a distinctive period detail in this classic car. What other original features stand out to you?

media:content.media:title: Plymouth Fury with a 45 RPM Player
media:content.media:description: A Plymouth Fury is featured with a built-in 45 RPM player, highlighting a distinctive period detail in this classic car. What other original features stand out to you?

item.title: Larkspur Blue '57 Chevy Perfection
item.description: A look at a Larkspur Blue 1957 Chevy, presented as a clean example of classic design and style. What details stand out most to you?

item.title: A 1956 Packard Clipper Emerges
item.description: A look at a 1956 Packard Clipper, with attention to its design and place in automotive history. What details stand out most to you?

item.title: 56 Nomad Perfection
item.description: A look at a 1956 Nomad, presented as a clean example of classic design and style. This showcase highlights the vehicle’s timeless lines and appeal to car enthusiasts. What details stand out to you?

media:content.media:title: 56 Nomad Perfection
media:content.media:description: A look at a 1956 Nomad, presented as a clean example of classic design and style. This showcase highlights the vehicle’s timeless lines and appeal to car enthusiasts. What details stand out to you?

item.title: Buick LeSabre: Style and Presence
item.description: A showcase of the Buick LeSabre highlighting its design, comfort, and classic styling. The video focuses on its road presence and era-specific appeal. What defines “classic comfort” in a car for you?

media:content.media:title: Buick LeSabre: Style and Presence
media:content.media:description: A showcase of the Buick LeSabre highlighting its design, comfort, and classic styling. The video focuses on its road presence and era-specific appeal. What defines “classic comfort” in a car for you?

item.title: 1931 Ford Huckster Delivery Wagon
item.description: A look at a 1931 Ford Model A Huckster used as a delivery wagon, showcasing early utility design and restoration work. The video explores its unique role in automotive history. What stands out most about early commercial vehicles?

media:content.media:title: 1931 Ford Huckster Delivery Wagon
media:content.media:description: A look at a 1931 Ford Model A Huckster used as a delivery wagon, showcasing early utility design and restoration work. The video explores its unique role in automotive history. What stands out most about early commercial vehicles?

item.title: 1965 Ford Mustang 2+2 Fastback
item.description: A detailed look at a classic 1965 Ford Mustang 2+2 Fastback, highlighting its fastback design, styling, and performance character. The video explores what makes this model a standout in early Mustang history. What feature defines the classic Mustang look for you?

media:content.media:title: 1965 Ford Mustang 2+2 Fastback
media:content.media:description: A detailed look at a classic 1965 Ford Mustang 2+2 Fastback, highlighting its fastback design, styling, and performance character. The video explores what makes this model a standout in early Mustang history. What feature defines the classic Mustang look for you?

item.title: 1963 Pontiac Catalina 421 V8 4-Speed
item.description: A feature on a 1963 Pontiac Catalina equipped with a 421 V8 and 4-speed transmission. The video explores its performance heritage and classic muscle character. Would you prefer it in original or restored condition?

media:content.media:title: 1963 Pontiac Catalina 421 V8 4-Speed
media:content.media:description: A feature on a 1963 Pontiac Catalina equipped with a 421 V8 and 4-speed transmission. The video explores its performance heritage and classic muscle character. Would you prefer it in original or restored condition?

item.title: 1954 Buick Special With Just 28K Miles
item.description: A well-preserved 1954 Buick Special showing exceptionally low mileage and original-era styling. The video highlights preservation, condition, and historical value. What do you think is harder to find: originality or mileage?

media:content.media:title: 1954 Buick Special With Just 28K Miles
media:content.media:description: A well-preserved 1954 Buick Special showing exceptionally low mileage and original-era styling. The video highlights preservation, condition, and historical value. What do you think is harder to find: originality or mileage?

item.title: Rare 1970 Chrysler 300 Hurst on Display
item.description: My Car Story With Lou showcases a rare 1970 Chrysler 300 Hurst and its standout design.

media:content.media:title: Rare 1970 Chrysler 300 Hurst on Display
media:content.media:description: My Car Story With Lou showcases a rare 1970 Chrysler 300 Hurst and its standout design.

item.title: A 52-Year-Old New Yorker Makes a Statement
item.description: A feature on a classic Chrysler New Yorker highlighting its styling, presence, and period design details. The video explores what makes this vintage model stand out on display. What’s your favorite era for classic American cars?

media:content.media:title: A 52-Year-Old New Yorker Makes a Statement
media:content.media:description: A feature on a classic Chrysler New Yorker highlighting its styling, presence, and period design details. The video explores what makes this vintage model stand out on display. What’s your favorite era for classic American cars?

item.title: Evel Knievel’s Iconic Formula 1
item.description: A feature exploring a Formula 1-related piece associated with Evel Knievel, highlighting its history and connection to motorsport culture. The video focuses on legacy and storytelling. What part of racing history interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Evel Knievel’s Iconic Formula 1
media:content.media:description: A feature exploring a Formula 1-related piece associated with Evel Knievel, highlighting its history and connection to motorsport culture. The video focuses on legacy and storytelling. What part of racing history interests you most?

item.title: Preserving a Classic 1964 Impala
item.description: A look at efforts to preserve and maintain a 1964 Chevrolet Impala, focusing on restoration and care for a classic icon. The video highlights attention to detail and preservation work. What makes this model so iconic?

media:content.media:title: Preserving a Classic 1964 Impala
media:content.media:description: A look at efforts to preserve and maintain a 1964 Chevrolet Impala, focusing on restoration and care for a classic icon. The video highlights attention to detail and preservation work. What makes this model so iconic?

item.title: 1951 Kaiser Traveler Deluxe Hatchback
item.description: A feature on a 1951 Kaiser Traveler Deluxe Hatchback, showcasing its unique design and post-war automotive styling. The video explores its historical context and condition. What makes early hatchback designs interesting?

media:content.media:title: 1951 Kaiser Traveler Deluxe Hatchback
media:content.media:description: A feature on a 1951 Kaiser Traveler Deluxe Hatchback, showcasing its unique design and post-war automotive styling. The video explores its historical context and condition. What makes early hatchback designs interesting?

item.title: Early Automobile History: 1898 Jeanperrin Vis-à-Vis
item.description: A look back at one of the earliest automobiles, the 1898 Jeanperrin Vis-à-Vis, exploring its design and role in automotive history. The video highlights early engineering innovation. What surprises you most about early cars?

media:content.media:title: Early Automobile History: 1898 Jeanperrin Vis-à-Vis
media:content.media:description: A look back at one of the earliest automobiles, the 1898 Jeanperrin Vis-à-Vis, exploring its design and role in automotive history. The video highlights early engineering innovation. What surprises you most about early cars?

item.title: 1938 SS Jaguar 100 Returns After Decades
item.description: A rare 1938 SS Jaguar 100 is revisited after many years, showcasing its restoration and historical importance. The video highlights its craftsmanship and preservation. What detail from pre-war cars stands out most?

media:content.media:title: 1938 SS Jaguar 100 Returns After Decades
media:content.media:description: A rare 1938 SS Jaguar 100 is revisited after many years, showcasing its restoration and historical importance. The video highlights its craftsmanship and preservation. What detail from pre-war cars stands out most?
